dashboard.label: AgentWatch — AI Observability
dashboard.description: Real-time monitoring for Splunk AI agents

search.query: index=agentwatch_traces earliest=-24h | stats avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency, count as calls, max(latency_ms) as max_latency by tool | eval status=if(avg_latency>3000,"SLOW",if(avg_latency>1500,"MEDIUM","FAST")) | sort -avg_latency
index=agentwatch_traces earliest=-24h | timechart span=1h count by tool
index=agentwatch_quality earliest=-7d | timechart span=6h avg(hallucination_score) as hallucination, avg(relevance_score) as relevance, avg(completeness_score) as completeness
index=agentwatch_quality earliest=-7d | timechart span=6h count(eval(flagged="True")) as flagged, count(eval(flagged="False")) as passed

index=agentwatch_traces earliest=-7d | timechart span=1h sum(tokens_estimated) as hourly_tokens | fillnull value=0 hourly_tokens | predict hourly_tokens future_timespan=24 holdback=0 upper95=upper95 lower95=lower95

index=agentwatch_traces earliest=-7d | timechart span=1h sum(tokens_estimated) as hourly_tokens | fillnull value=0 hourly_tokens | predict hourly_tokens future_timespan=24 holdback=0 upper95=upper95 | eval anomaly=if(hourly_tokens > 'upper95(prediction(hourly_tokens))', "🔴 SPIKE", "✅ Normal") | where anomaly="🔴 SPIKE" | eval hourly_tokens=round(hourly_tokens,0) | eval predicted=round('prediction(hourly_tokens)',0) | eval upper=round('upper95(prediction(hourly_tokens))',0) | table _time, hourly_tokens, predicted, upper, anomaly
index=main sourcetype=agentwatch:notable earliest=-7d | eval confidence=round(confidence,2) | table _time, tool, severity, root_cause, fix, spl_correction, confidence | sort -_time

index=agentwatch_traces earliest=-24h | stats count as total_calls, avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency, count(eval(status="error")) as errors by tool | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency,0) | eval error_rate=round(errors/total_calls*100,1)."%" | sort -total_calls
